action.reasoning: Observation: The UNet baseline achieved a significant improvement (rmse_z500: 662.0, rmse_t850: 3.11) in just 10 epochs (~4 mins). The validation loss was still decreasing steadily. Analysis: The model has room for improvement in both capacity and training duration. Adding static geographical features (latitude and longitude) will help the model learn location-specific weather patterns (e.g., Coriolis effect, climate zones). Increasing the base channel dimension from 64 to 128 will increase model capacity while keeping it well within the parameter limit (~30M params). Training for 40 epochs with OneCycleLR will ensure better convergence. Decision: Update the model to accept static features (lat, sin(lon), cos(lon)), increase base_dim to 128, and train for 40 epochs with OneCycleLR and gradient clipping.
